hero.subhead: Trusted care professionals for recovery, elderly support, post-op care, and everyday help — booked in minutes, delivered to your door.
hero.joinNurseLink: Are you a healthcare provider? Join Care+
hero.contactCta: Have a question? Talk to a Care+ coordinator
hero.imageAlt: A nurse providing compassionate home care

pillars.title: Four ways we support your family

findNurse.title: Find a Nurse
findNurse.body: One-time visits or shift care — book a verified nurse for what you need.

carePackages.title: Care Packages
carePackages.body: Multi-day plans for recovery, elderly support, palliative, and more.

medicalStore.title: Medical Store
medicalStore.body: Equipment, supplies, and home-care essentials delivered to your door.

community.title: Community
community.body: Donate or receive medical equipment from families nearby.

why.title: Care when your family needs it most

parent.situation: When a parent needs daily support
parent.description: Elderly care shouldn't mean a care home. Nurses bring routine support — medication, mobility, companionship — directly home.

recovery.situation: When recovery is harder than expected
recovery.description: Post-surgery care is critical and exhausting. A trained nurse handles wound care and monitoring so recovery happens properly.

absent.situation: When you can't always be there
absent.description: Life doesn't stop when someone needs care. Families trust Care+ to be present when they can't — with verified, compassionate professionals.

patients.title: For Patients & Families
patients.subtitle: Get care at home in 3 steps
patients.step2Desc: Choose date and care type. Confirm. No paperwork.
patients.step3Desc: A verified nurse arrives ready to help.

nurses.title: For Healthcare Professionals
nurses.subtitle: Earn on your own schedule
nurses.step2Desc: Our team reviews your credentials and activates your profile.
nurses.step3Desc: Manage your schedule and get paid per completed session.

library.title: Short videos from our care team

communityPreview.title: Medical equipment, shared by families
communityPreview.subtitle: Families donating wheelchairs, walkers, and supplies they no longer need.
